info.title: FF
info.description: A tool to quickly find files in the current directory recursively.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Find file and directory names fast!

options.name: -regex
options.description:
- Treat the patterns as regular expressions. The default
follows DOS wildcard usage. Make sure to use regex values

options.name: -includedir
options.description: - Include directory names when searching for matches. The

options.name: -nostats
options.description:
- Don't show the search statistics at the end. Useful when
you just want the list of matching files. (short: -ns)
